g.text: Step out onto the flat low-tide rocks.
Hurry to the {Q1_SPECIES} on the high le...
Climb the low steps for a closer look.
Think up a rescue plan for {Q1_NAME}.
Toss water up with your cupped hands.
Line up the plans and try again.
Shake off the splash and try again.
Wet your hands and gently slide {Q1_NAME...
Look over the plans once more.
Hurry toward the flappy splashing sound.
Sit with Gran and let the tide finish th...
Lean in and say hello to the little {Q2_...
Think up a plan to move {Q2_NAME}.
Line up the plans and try again.
Dig a little river over to {Q2_HOME}.
Smooth the sand and try again.
Scoop water and {Q2_NAME} up together in...
Look over the plans once more.
Watch {Q2_NAME} zoom around his big new ...
Follow the clack-clack sound to the seaw...
Cross the rocks to the seaweed patch.
Think up a plan to untangle {Q3_NAME}.
Give the seaweed one quick tug.
Hold out the picnic spoon for {Q3_NAME} ...
Pocket the spoon and try again.
Untangle one seaweed ribbon at a time.
Untangle one ribbon at a time, {COMPANIO...
Look over the plans once more.
Watch {Q3_NAME} scuttle into the cool po...
Head for the tiny shell far up the rock.
Tiptoe up the dry rock to the tiny shell...
Bend down and greet the little {Q4_SPECI...
Think up a plan to bring {Q4_NAME} home.
Roll {Q4_NAME} along like a tiny wheel.
Smile at the stubborn shell and try agai...
Line up the plans and try again.
Offer {Q4_NAME} a ride on your wet palm.
Look over the plans once more.
Look up at the sparkling line of {TIDE}.
Watch the first wave-finger slide in.
Race the foam line up the dry sand.
Peek around for anyone else who needs he...
Run the last few splashy-sounding steps.
Call each friend's name as their pool fi...
Raise juice cups to the rescue team.
